title: Sophisticated Inventory Interactions
description: Adds Sophisticated-style search, sort, and transfer controls to vanilla and compatible modded container GUIs, including player-inventory sorting.
body:
# Sophisticated Inventory Interactions

**Sophisticated Inventory Interactions** extends Sophisticated-style inventory controls to vanilla containers and compatible modded inventory screens.

The goal is simple: make everyday inventory management faster and more consistent, even outside Sophisticated-native GUIs.

## Features

### Search in supported container GUIs

A built-in search field lets you quickly filter visible container contents so you can find what you need without manually scanning rows of slots.

### Container sorting with sort modes

Sort container contents using Sophisticated-style sorting controls, including multiple sort modes:

*   **Name** – alphabetical ordering
*   **Mod** – grouped by mod namespace
*   **Count** – larger stacks first
*   **Tags** – grouped with tag-aware ordering

### Player inventory sorting (including regular inventory screen)

Sort your player’s **main inventory (27 slots)** directly from supported screens, including the regular player inventory GUI, while leaving hotbar order unchanged.

### Transfer buttons (container ↔ player)

Convenient transfer controls are added to supported screens:

*   **Transfer all** – move all valid matching items to the destination side
*   **Filtered transfer** – move only items that match what already exists in the destination inventory

### Sort keybind support

The Sophisticated sort keybind is context-aware in supported screens:

*   hovering player inventory triggers player-inventory sort
*   hovering container area (or outside slots) triggers container sort

On the regular player inventory screen, the keybind triggers player main-inventory sorting.

### Search phrase memory (client configurable)

Optionally remember the current search phrase between supported GUIs, including sharing between Sophisticated and non-Sophisticated inventory screens.

## Modpack-Friendly Configuration

Because modded GUIs can vary a lot, this mod includes screen/menu eligibility controls so pack makers can decide where features should apply and exclude problematic screens when needed.

## Designed as an Addon

This mod is designed to **expand** Sophisticated-style interactions beyond Sophisticated-native inventories while keeping existing Sophisticated behavior intact.
